programme.title: E412 - Snow Day Showdown

programme.title: E210 - Too Many Swipers / Bateo's Home Run
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Swiper re-join with his duplicates and make it to Grandma's picnic. / Dora and Boots help Bateo the Bat get to the baseball game in time to play.

programme.title: E706 - The Snowflake Games
programme.desc: It's a head-to-head showdown when Blaze and Crusher enter... The Snowflake Games! Who will win the most winter sports and receive the prized Snowflake Medal?

programme.title: E849 - Jukebox
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Granny and Grandpa Pig visit the sailing club where they find a juke box. They have fun dancing to all different types of music.

programme.title: E852 - The Sandcastle
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a day out at the seaside and build a very large sandcastle with all their friends.

programme.title: E108 - The Team Truck Challenge
programme.desc: It's the day of the Team Truck Challenge, a race where all the trucks get to compete in teams of two! But when Crusher chooses a new partner instead of Pickle, his disappointed sidekick teams up with Blaze to prove his mettle.

programme.title: E125 - The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: E213 - The Crew Builds A Reuse-It Station
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove.

programme.title: E849 - Jukebox
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Granny and Grandpa Pig visit the sailing club where they find a juke box. They have fun dancing to all different types of music.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off. / Dora, Boots and Backpack play an adventurous game of Hide-and-Seek to find Map.

programme.title: E102 - Birthday Party / Tick Tock Mr. Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: E708 - Mission To Mars
programme.desc: NASA's Commander Megan is back! And she's taking Blaze and his friends to... Mars! But when Crusher accidently detaches the rocket ship's thrusters, it's up to Mars Rover Blaze to navigate Mars and get those thrusters back!

programme.title: E303 - Pedro's Cough

programme.title: E4 - Making Ends Meet
programme.desc: The Pelletiers make up for lost time as they try to cut 3000 trees in a week, but a damaged bridge shuts down trucking and requires fixing.

programme.title: E10 - Flipped For A 69 Chevy Shortbed Part II
programme.desc: Jordan and Tom look for a replacement cab for a demolished '69 Chevy Pickup, and Thomas tries to flip a '59 Oldsmobile.

programme.title: E1 - Bayou And Tarantula Bar
programme.desc: Aaron and Mike builds a custom bayou bar while avoiding a family's pet alligator. Greta and Fitz captures a tarantula to bring life into a Silver City classic bar

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. programme.title: E10 - Path of the Matriarch
programme.desc: In southern India, the summer is a challenge for Asian elephants who must drink every day. As things dry up, Anura, the matriarch, leads her herd to a distant watering hole. But will she succeed in getting her 3-month-old grandson there in time?

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E2 - Jungle Love
programme.desc: It’s not easy to fall in love in the jungle. Find out how these animals turn to strategic mating strategies in order to pass on their genes. Meet monkeys who like monogamy, a bird who rivals Casanova, and a spider who’ll risk his life for love.

programme.title: E5 - The Valley of the Birds
programme.desc: Zambia’s Luangwa Valley is home to Africa’s biggest and most fearsome giants, but what really makes it special are its birds. There are over 400 different species here; each perfectly adapted to exploit every opportunity on offer.

programme.title: E234 - Patnocchio / ChefBob

programme.title: E103 - Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E523 - A Tale of Two Pipers
programme.desc: Henry gets an unexpected visitor claiming to be from the future. When a boy-robot killing machine steps onto the scene, The Gang must find a way to save everyone from an apocalyptic future.

programme.title: E223 - Read Aloud / Not a Loud
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library but Lola refuses to participate. // When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: E129 - #FresnoGirl
programme.desc: Sam and Cat promise to buy a girl they babysit a Fresno Girl doll if she raises her grades. When she does, Sam and Cat are financially strained by the markups and add-ons that come with it. Goomer loses his lucky t-shirt.

programme.title: E212 - The Mastermind Unmasked: Part 1
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe discover that Lazlo Chance may be the evil Mastermind and enlist Chloe to help. But when Chloe is torn between her head and her heart, it threatens the entire mission.

programme.title: E422 - Up The Stairs!
programme.desc: When a local celebrity chef comes to Junk-N-Stuff to do his live show, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to hike a half a mile up the Man Stairs so they can be on the show.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E212 - The Mastermind Unmasked: Part 1
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe discover that Lazlo Chance may be the evil Mastermind and enlist Chloe to help. But when Chloe is torn between her head and her heart, it threatens the entire mission.

programme.title: E110 - iAm Your Biggest Fan
programme.desc: iCarly's biggest fan, Mandy, is invited onto the show as a one-girl studio audience. Mandy turns out to be more of a stalker than a fan and the kids have to get rid of her.

programme.title: E304 - Selfie Improvement / No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. // Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: Love My Scent
programme.desc: Chang-soo, a guy who has never been in a romantic relationship, earns a magical power after accidentally wearing a perfume he receives from a stranger. The supernatural power he earns is what any man would dream of, an ability to attract every woman in the world! Ara, a woman Chang-soo has been in love with, begins to sense the scent of Chang-soo and falls in love with him. While they gradually grow their connection, Ara's ex-boyfriend, James, suddenly appears and reveals Chang-soo's secret! Will the two people overcome this predicament and find true love in each other?

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Mainland Q&A (IV)
programme.desc: MAINLAND Q&A: Zero-distance from the heavyweights and top leaders is the draw of this program. It reveals striking details about the thoughts of the most influential decision-makers, telling viewers the pulse of the time.

programme.title: Financial Journal
programme.desc: Financial Journal gives in-depth analysis and up-to-date financial news such as stock, commodity, currency market and exchange rate from Great China and around the world.

programme.title: Phoenix Focus 1800
programme.desc: PHOENIX FOCUS: Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix Focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.

programme.desc: News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: Phoenix Financial Daily Report
programme.desc: Phoenix Financial Daily Report : Aims to help audience figure out the financial clues from a choice selection of the hottest news of the day. programme.title: E19 - Lemon
programme.desc: Lemon performs a stand-up routine!

programme.title: E29 - Operation Kiwi
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot and Tomato are exploring in the plant aisle when they hear a strange noise. They follow the noise and meet the famous Kiwi the Explorer, who needs their help.

programme.title: E11 - Pigs Might Fly
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E30 - Barky Boats
programme.desc: Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with their two buddies Mia and Captain; when the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

programme.title: E41 - Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E13 - Central Park, New York
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: E12 - White Cliffs Of Dover, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.title: E15 - Holiday
programme.desc: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day.

programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'coat' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see all different types of coat - a snowy coat, a glowy coat and even a goat in a coat!

programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E3 - Frog Song
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: E31 - Burger Shop
programme.desc: It's time for Bluey and Bingo to get out of the bath. But Dad has decided not to tell them what to do and gets roped into a game of Burger Shop.

programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.desc: Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!

programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: Ebb and the New Boat
programme.desc: A new boat arrives and Bird makes a new friend Zoot, a tiny yellow canary who lives on the boat. They become inseparable. Grrrr. Then, one day, the new boat is gone along with Zoot. Bird pines. Ebb and Flo create a little gift to cheer Bird up.

programme.title: Vikings
programme.desc: Like Raven and Little Lewis, the famous giants of the northern mists, the Vikings, are master looters and navigators. Besides being bloody warriors and shrewd negotiators, the Vikings are also great explorers, out to discover the world.

programme.title: Rainy Day Fun
programme.desc: After a day of mud sliding, the kids have to problem solve when heavy rain endangers some of the Kiwifruit Valley creatures.

programme.title: The Paper Plane Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts learn about the different shapes of paper planes, and then have to help Heni rescue Burpee from the top of a tree.

programme.title: Extraordinary Energy
programme.desc: The doctors reveal the incredible energy stores that make your body work around the clock. We are going to meet a super-smelling Brilliant Body whose nose can sniff out cancer and get more answers to some medical questions.

programme.title: Time to Say Goodbye
programme.desc: It's the last day at vet school for the Junior Vets. They faced their fears, overcame anxieties, and, most importantly, they helped all sorts of animals, pets, and critters.

programme.title: Grizzlies of British Columbia
programme.desc: Philippe travels to see the spectacular scenery of British Columbia. He meets some of the animals living in this remote wilderness.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 3: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: A group of young explorers head for the sea on their search for the biggest of the Big Seven wild animals in South Africa – the whale. On the way they meet giant snails, noisy frogs and dolphins. They are about to give up their search when they spot two playful whales.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 4: Hunters of the Deep
programme.desc: A group of young explorers are on a search for the Big Seven wild animals in South Africa. Today they are on the trail of a Great White Shark. From the research boat they spot a massive five-meter shark, one of the biggest ever seen at Bird Island.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Rainy Day Fun
programme.desc: After a day of mud sliding, the kids have to problem solve when heavy rain endangers some of the Kiwifruit Valley creatures.

programme.title: The Paper Plane Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts learn about the different shapes of paper planes, and then have to help Heni rescue Burpee from the top of a tree.

programme.title: The Water Cycle
programme.desc: Overheated, Kit loses consciousness and embarks on a strange dream journey around the world.

programme.title: The High Life
programme.desc: Doki wants his team to be the champion in the game of Grounders. He figures they have to learn to play entirely off the ground - but how long can you really go without touching the ground? To find out, they head to a rainforest in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Sprinter 2.0
programme.desc: Sprinter fixes an exoskeleton called 'Sprinter 2.0' so it can help him with his heroic deeds, and of course, Cleopatra immediately set her eyes on it. Unfortunately for both of them, 'Sprinter 2.0' has its own will and has a different plan for itself.

programme.title: Santa's Little Helper
programme.desc: Granny Pina is decorating the Christmas tree while the Buffycats are playing. Suddenly, Santa's helper cat Glitter crash lands in the garden! The Buffycats will have to help him find all the gifts he lost and save Christmas for all cats!

programme.title: The High Life
programme.desc: Doki wants his team to be the champion in the game of Grounders. He figures they have to learn to play entirely off the ground - but how long can you really go without touching the ground? To find out, they head to a rainforest in Costa Rica.

programme.title: The Water Cycle
programme.desc: Overheated, Kit loses consciousness and embarks on a strange dream journey around the world.

programme.title: Balloon Lung
programme.desc: How do you breathe in and out? In this make we'll build a respiratory system. It sounds complicated, but it won't take lung!

programme.title: 2011: A Year of Space Odyssey
programme.desc: The year 2011 was remarkable as NASA visited several planets, asteroids and comets. Host Emily Calandrelli explores the amazing journeys of spacecraft that gathered spectacular images of Mercury, Jupiter and Mars.

programme.title: Time to Be Amazing
programme.desc: It's the first time Harry and George will be competing since George broke his arm and was told he would never be able to do gym again. And Dove and Nyree are determined to prove they are ready to take on the world!

programme.title: No Fear
programme.desc: Competition season is in full swing, and Josh and Kloe are preparing for the biggest competition on the British calendar. While Josh does all he can to calm his nerves, Kloe suffers an injury during practice, and things are not looking good.

programme.title: Find the Culprit
programme.desc: Eric learns that everyone has their own unique fingerprint. He shows how to do a fingerprint experiment and then he uses it to find out who took a bite out of his chocolate cake.

E2
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: Relative Or Foe? - Neanderthals And Us
programme.desc: Although they were physically superior to us, Neanderthals did not prevail. What made them different and why did they become extinct? How close or hostile were they to modern man?

programme.title: Octopus Under Threat - Searching For Clues Around The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: Relative Or Foe? - Neanderthals And Us
programme.desc: Although they were physically superior to us, Neanderthals did not prevail. What made them different and why did they become extinct? How close or hostile were they to modern man?

programme.title: Octopus Under Threat - Searching For Clues Around The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: Street Debate: Did Kaluma Boy Expose Kenya's Broken And Corrupt System?
programme.desc: In Kenya, corruption scandals and a failing health system leave families stranded. When hospitals and governments vanish, citizens turn to TikTok and civil society for help to build roads, equip schools or anything else. The story of Kaluma Boy caring for his sick father exposes a dysfunctional state and the power of online solidarity.

programme.desc: The weekly half-hour program delivers in-depth reporting on topical political issues and newsworthy events. Revealing the story behind the stories, 'Close up' is informative, gripping and visually powerful.

programme.title: Best Of DW Podcasts
programme.desc: Select DW podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: 浩瀚的九州大地上，大徵朝珠賦沉重，逼得漁民絞殺親子，以謀鮫女落淚而得鮫珠，沿海漁村的少女海市（楊冪飾）因此遭遇，父母亡故，全村被屠戮。生死關頭，她求助於途經此地的大徵第一權臣方諸（陳偉霆飾演），歷經考驗，最終被方諸帶回天啟。海市從此女扮男裝，成為方諸的徒弟。此時，大徵內憂外患不斷，喜怒不定的年輕皇帝褚仲旭（徐開騁飾），因為經受皇朝內亂，而對生失去了一切興趣，表面上以昏君自居，卻在方諸苦苦支撐國家和平時，暗中默默觀望這一切。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: Jasmin Flores lives a peaceful life in her mountain hometown until she falls for Arthur Pelaez, a man hiding dark secrets. Arthur is tied to a powerful gun cartel and trapped in a marriage to Iris Buenavidez. When Arthur becomes a target over stolen money, Jasmin loses everything and reinvents herself as Lavender Fields, seeking revenge against those who destroyed her life. The series blends romance, betrayal, and vengeance in a high-stakes world of crime and family power struggles.

programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: She Shoots Straight
programme.desc: One by one, the Huangs died in the course of safeguarding law and order in Hong Kong. First, the father and then the two elder sons gave their lives in action. That leaves Tsung-pao, the youngest son, and four daughters. They are all police officers. What makes the mother prouder is Tsung-pao's marrying a senior policewoman Mina. Old Mrs. Huang is hoping to see a grandson to carry on the lawmen family tree. But the sisters don't like Mina. They make sure she does not have a good time. Mina suffers in silence. A raid on a Vietnamese gang was ordered. Tsung-pao and Mina to command. But sister Ling commits a serious mistake and the whole operation fails. Ling is suspended. She blames it on Mina...

programme.title: Aces Go Places III
programme.desc: King Kong is commissioned by a man who claims to be Mr. Bond, special agent from the British Secret Service to recover for the Queen precious stones stolen from her crown which are now in Hong Kong. Back in Hong Kong, a Secret Service man from the Bond Street Headquarters, Mr. Tom Collins, has just arrived to find out a gang of notorious international crooks led by Mr. Bond. Carried out his mission successfully for Mr. Bond, King Kong is summoned by the Governor to assist Collins in retrieving the stolen goods and catch Mr. Bond's gang.

programme.desc: Steven discovers a new power when he grows a patch of Steven-shaped watermelons!

programme.title: E13 - B. Great Fusilli/McPherson Phantom/Feast of the Bullfrogs/Tulip's Worm/Shirley the Me
programme.desc: A travelling stage arrives at the farm manned by an evil stage master, who turns Muriel and the Farmer into puppets. Courage must save the day once again.

programme.title: E68 - The Tails of Mardrynia/Game Show
programme.desc: After reading a book about a mystical animal society in class, Clarence is inspired to round up local animals and recreate an animal world of his own, to cheer up his friend Percy.

programme.title: E49 - A. The Mirror/The Burden/The Bros/The Man/The Pizza
programme.desc: When Gumball refuses to forward a scare email, the curse becomes all too real.

programme.title: E5 - The Boondoggle
programme.desc: When an investigative reporter comes to Walton's Mountain to write a historical guide to the State of Virginia, he uncovers a secret that embarrasses the Baldwin sisters and angers the rest of the community.

programme.title: E9 - The Great Depression (Part 1)
programme.desc: 12-year-old Alex Haley learns his family history from grandfather. Simon lands a professorship at an Alabama college where he helps the local rural sharecroppers increase production, in addition to his classroom work.

programme.title: E11 - Darrin the Warlock
programme.desc: Darrin lands the account after all and is re-instated.

programme.title: E4 - Greenshaw's Folly (Part 2)
programme.desc: On a stormy night, family friend Louisa seeks Miss Marple’s help. Marple sends Louisa and her son to Greenshaw’s Folly, where Louisa becomes secretary to the eccentric Miss Greenshaw—soon drawing attention and becoming entangled in danger at the estate.

programme.title: E14 - Confidential
programme.desc: A women’s murder is linked to a vast ponzi scheme that leads detectives benson and stabler to reopen the investigation of a similar crime committed twenty years earlier.

programme.title: Binny & Family
programme.desc: Rebellious teenage Binny and her conservative grandfather from Bihar connect after a dramatic incident. Can the contrasting personalities bridge generational gaps and impact each other's lives?

programme.title: Tuesdays & Fridays
programme.desc: Two millennials get into a relationship where they are allowed to meet only on 'Tuesdays , Fridays'.

programme.title: E1 - From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Join Gecko on his biggest adventures yet, from waterfalls to outer space! First, when Grandma's caravan rolls into a river & heads for a waterfall, Gecko must perform a daring chase to save her! Then, a lovely day at the beach becomes perilous when some vehicles get caught in the tide, requiring a helicopter rescue. The adventure blasts off as the Mechs accidentally launch their homemade spaceship to the moon & need to use solar power to get home!

programme.title: E2 - Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are turning little problems into big adventures! When Mr. Vanderboos accidentally sprays hair growth serum on Daddy, Officer Freeze mistakes him for a hairy monster, & a wild chase begins! Then, Mila has a bad cold, but she still has to help Morphle figure out the right morphs to rescue a dog stuck in a tree. From playing a quiet game to avoid waking a napping neighbor to playing hide & seek with friends, every little problem is a big adventure!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Play Together and Have Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to play together & have fun with Baby John & his friends! Baby John & Manny spend an exciting day at the pool, where they learn to follow all the safety procedures. Then, the two get a little competitive at the playground as they try to outdo each other building sandcastles & playing soccer. The fun continues as the boys set up their very own car wash after getting their electric cars all muddy!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E2 - Little Problems, Big Adventures!

Then, Mila has a bad cold, but she still has to help Morphle figure out the right morphs to rescue a dog stuck in a tree. From playing a quiet game to avoid waking a napping neighbor to playing hide & seek with friends, every little problem is a big adventure!

programme.title: E2 - Jill's Super Creative Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Jill for some super creative adventures! It's time for the Princess Ball, & Jill decides to decorate her dress. Baby John accidentally spills paint on it, but Jill discovers that an accident can actually help creativity! Then, she decorates her shoes with sparkly stickers to make them the shiniest ever! The creative fun continues as Jill's dressed up as a pink firefighter to help her brothers & has to work hard to keep her princess bunny happy!

programme.title: Last Dance
programme.desc: Aged 75 Germain, a contemplative home-body, finds himself widowed and having to cope with his children's somewhat invasive concern about him. Determined to keep a promise made to his wife years earlier, he has to take part in a contemporary dance creation, but without letting the family know.

programme.title: E7 - A Wounded President
programme.desc: Excluded from power, Francis and his allies accuse Suzanne of trying to seize the country's resources. As Salem targets the president's private sphere, his associates, running out of patience, double-cross him with a plan that is both ambitious and devastating for the country's future.

programme.title: E23 - Nona Source/Bateaux-Mouches/T3 Architecture/Fifties Fashion
programme.desc: An ethical alternative project by LVMH, Nona Source is a resale platform for exceptional fabric. All about the origins of the Bateaux-Mouches. The T3 Architecture practice in Marseilles presents architectural design with an artisanal touch. The very feminine fashion style of the 1950s continues to inspire major designers.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: E2 - Justin Fisch, Naturalist And Guide In Florida
programme.desc: He figures amongst the thirty Canadians aged under 30 considered the most influential in terms of sustainable development. Justin Fisch welcomes a group for a trip by canoe-kayak through the Everglades: a forty-kilometre journey to explore the famous wetlands.

programme.title: E9 - A Collector's Garden
programme.desc: In Erlenbach, near Zurich, Hanspeter Burkhard and Arnold Wiessmann have succeeded in concentrating an incredible level of diversity in a surprisingly small space.
